testimonial.quote: Best tech marketplace in Gaza! I sold my laptop in just 2 days and the process was incredibly smooth.
testimonial.author: Ahmed Hassan

login.heading: Connect, Buy & Sell Technology Products
login.description: Join the leading tech marketplace in Gaza. Discover amazing deals, connect with tech enthusiasts, and grow your business.

secureTransactions.title: Secure Transactions
secureTransactions.description: Buy and sell with confidence using our secure payment system and buyer protection.

vibrantCommunity.title: Vibrant Community
vibrantCommunity.description: Connect with thousands of tech enthusiasts, share knowledge, and discuss trends.

fastListing.title: Fast & Easy Listing
fastListing.description: List your products in minutes and reach thousands of potential buyers instantly.

signup.heading: Start Your Tech Journey Today
signup.description: Create your free account and unlock access to thousands of tech products, exclusive deals, and a thriving community of technology enthusiasts.

welcomeBonus.title: Welcome Bonus
welcomeBonus.description: Get 100 points instantly when you create your account to use on your first purchase.

instantNotifications.title: Instant Notifications
instantNotifications.description: Be the first to know about new products, price drops, and exclusive member-only deals.

freeStoreSetup.title: Free Store Setup
freeStoreSetup.description: Launch your own tech store in minutes and start selling to our community of buyers.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Our dedicated support team is always ready to help you with any questions or issues.

verifyEmail.heading: Check Your Inbox
verifyEmail.description: We've sent a verification code to secure your account. Enter the code to complete your registration.

enhancedSecurity.title: Enhanced Security
enhancedSecurity.description: Email verification helps protect your account from unauthorized access and ensures secure communication.

timeLimitedCode.title: Time-Limited Code
timeLimitedCode.description: Your verification code is valid for 10 minutes. Request a new code if it expires.

login.title: Welcome Back!
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to Gaza Tech Market

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.subtitle: Join Gaza Tech Market in just a few steps
signup.newsletter: Send me exclusive deals, product updates, and tech news via email
signup.securityDescription: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your personal information. Your data will never be shared with third parties without your consent.

toast.success: Account created successfully! Please verify your email.

validation.firstNameLettersOnly: First name must contain only letters
validation.lastNameLettersOnly: Last name must contain only letters
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to
verifyEmail.checkInboxDescription: Please enter the code we sent to your email address. The code will expire in 10 minutes.
verifyEmail.checkSpamOrResend: Check your spam folder or request a new code
verifyEmail.codeResentDescription: A new verification code has been sent to your email.
verifyEmail.tip1: Check your spam or junk folder if you don't see the email in your inbox
verifyEmail.tip2: Make sure you entered the correct email address during signup
verifyEmail.tip3: Wait a few minutes - email delivery can sometimes be delayed
verifyEmail.tip4: Contact support if you continue having issues with verification
verifyEmail.securityNoticeDescription: Never share your verification code with anyone. Gaza Tech Market will never ask for your code via phone or email.
